deductions.finding: Review burden too high — excessive human routing
deductions.reason: Well-calibrated auto-review should auto-approve low-risk proposals.
deductions.suggestedFix: Tune confidence thresholds; improve evidence quality to raise auto-approve rate.

deductions.reason: Excessive attending review slows publication velocity.
deductions.suggestedFix: Improve claim atomicity and decision point specificity to reduce EXPERT_REVIEW routing.
